title: Q'et
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''q'et''', or '''pouch-creature''', was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] creature which [[Nom Anor]] fastened underneath his arm under the guise of [[Nom Anor|Yu'shaa]]. It concealed a dedicated [[villip]] he used in his days as an [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Executor]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
